title: Static Between Stations - Relay Cipher Split Puzzle Board
prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Puzzle visual for "Relay Cipher Split". Objective: Combine three relay fragments distributed across party channels.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
